onboarding.welcome_subtitle: Not a diary, but a monthly journal. Minimal effort, maximum result.
onboarding.feature1: 10 questions per month, whenever it suits you
onboarding.feature2: For all your children at once
onboarding.feature3: See how your children grow — year after year
onboarding.add_child_desc: You can add more children later.
onboarding.error_birthdate: Please enter a date of birth

children.delete_desc: All answers for {{name}} will also be deleted. This cannot be undone.
children.tip_desc: Add a new child and they will automatically be included in your time journey. You'll immediately see how they resemble or differ from each other at the same age.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Preferences
settings.reminder_desc: Receive a notification when new questions are available
settings.pwa_note: Notifications work when the app is installed as a PWA on your device.
settings.export_note: All your answers are stored locally on this device. Export a backup regularly.
settings.clear_desc: All children, questions and answers will be permanently deleted.
settings.about_desc: Fases is a monthly journal for busy parents. Not a diary, but a few questions per month — whenever it suits you. The result: a wonderful time journey of your growing family.

Januari.1: What does mum or dad find most beautiful about me?
Januari.2: What do I like doing with mum?
Januari.3: How can you make me laugh?
Januari.4: How am I with other children?
Januari.6: Which stuffed animals do I have?
Januari.7: How am I with grandma and grandpa?
Januari.9: What do I like watching on TV?
Januari.10: Which chores do I help with?

Februari.1: What do I play with the most indoors?
Februari.2: What do I like doing with dad?
Februari.4: What winter clothes do I often wear?
Februari.6: What made mum or dad really laugh about me?
Februari.10: What winter sports do I do?

Maart.1: How am I when I wake up in the morning?
Maart.2: What is my favourite spot in the house?
Maart.4: How am I when I have to be alone for a while?
Maart.6: What words can I already say?
Maart.7: What time do I go to bed?
Maart.9: How do I get to school?
Maart.10: Who do I sit next to in class?

April.1: How am I with toilet training?
April.2: Why do I get really angry?
April.3: What do I absolutely not like to eat?
April.6: Which children do I play with the most?
April.7: What did we do at Easter?
April.8: Did we hunt for Easter eggs?
April.9: What did we do on King's Day?
April.10: How much pocket money do I get?

Mei.1: Can I already roll, crawl or walk?
Mei.2: What did I make for Mother's Day?
Mei.3: What did we do during the spring break?
Mei.4: What does mum often have to help with?
Mei.5: Which books do I like to read?
Mei.6: What did we do over the Ascension weekend?
Mei.7: Do I ever sleep over somewhere?
Mei.8: Which theme park do I like?
Mei.9: What do I like most on my sandwich?
Mei.10: How am I with tidying up?

Juni.1: Can I already ride a tricycle, scooter, bike or rollerskate?
Juni.2: What did we do during the spring break?
Juni.3: What does dad often have to help with?
Juni.4: When was the last time I was ill?
Juni.5: What did I make for Father's Day?
Juni.7: What am I really proud of?
Juni.8: Which word do I say all the time?
Juni.10: Who am I a fan of?

Juli.1: How do I like being outside?
Juli.2: What do I play with the most outdoors?
Juli.3: What do I like to do on holiday?
Juli.5: What is my absolute favourite food?
Juli.6: How do I feel about swimming?
Juli.7: How am I different from other children?
Juli.8: How do I feel in the car?
Juli.9: What clothes do I like to wear?
Juli.10: What do I want to be when I grow up?

Augustus.1: How do I like being in the pram?
Augustus.2: How did we go on holiday? (car, cottage, plane)
Augustus.3: What did we do a lot on holiday?
Augustus.4: What naughty things do I do sometimes?
Augustus.6: When did I have a lot of pain?
Augustus.8: Who were my friends on holiday?
Augustus.9: How much time do I spend on a phone or tablet?
Augustus.10: Which country do I like the most?

September.1: What can I do all by myself?
September.3: How do I usually look in photos?
September.5: Who do I look up to?
September.7: How or next to whom do I like sitting on the sofa?
September.10: What is my favourite subject at school?

Oktober.3: What did I last make in crafts?
Oktober.4: What did we do in the autumn break?
Oktober.6: What time do I go to bed?
Oktober.7: What do I like watching on TV?
Oktober.8: Who do I have a crush on?
Oktober.9: How do I get to school?
Oktober.10: Who do I sit next to in class?

November.1: What time do I wake up in the morning?
November.2: Which family do I love visiting?
November.3: What is a tradition in our family?
November.4: How are my teeth coming along?
November.5: How am I at the dentist or doctor?
November.6: What is on my wish list?
November.7: What funny things have I said?
November.9: What is my favourite day of the week and why?
November.10: What do I like least about school?

December.1: How am I at the dinner table?
December.2: What did I think of Saint Nicholas?
December.4: When am I at my cutest?
December.5: What did we do in the Christmas holidays?
December.6: How did we decorate the house for Christmas?
December.7: What can I enjoy at Christmas?
December.8: How did we celebrate New Year?
December.9: What is the sweetest thing I have said to mum or dad?
December.10: What will I do better next year?

birthday_q.1: How did we celebrate my birthday?
birthday_q.3: What kind of cake did we have?
birthday_q.4: What did I really want for my birthday?
birthday_q.6: What was the best part of my birthday?
birthday_q.7: Which children were at my birthday party?
birthday_q.8: What did we do at my birthday party?
birthday_q.9: What did I bring as a treat to school?
birthday_q.10: What did I promise to do better now that I'm a year older?

book.title: Family Book
book.subtitle: Your story
book.empty_desc: Fill in a few months first, then create a book here.
book.print_desc: Soon you'll be able to order your Fases book as a real photo book through a print service.

milestone_q.1: When did I smile for the first time?
milestone_q.2: When did I first sleep through the night?
milestone_q.5: When did I first use the potty?
milestone_q.6: When could I ride a bike without stabilisers?
milestone_q.7: When did my first tooth fall out?
milestone_q.8: When did I get my first medal?
milestone_q.9: When did I get my swimming certificate?
milestone_q.10: When did I have my first boyfriend or girlfriend?
